zh.lifeSummary: 當Leuca ferch Gruffudd於大約1190年出生時，她的父親Gruffydd II ap Rhys34歲，母親Matilda de Braose19歲。她與Geoffrey de Camville結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於大約1239年享年51歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Leuca ferch Gruffudd于大约1190年出生时，她的父亲Gruffydd II ap Rhys34岁，母亲Matilda de Braose19岁。她与Geoffrey de Camville结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于大约1239年享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: ferch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

variants.name: Ferg
meanings: German: occupational name for a ferryman, Middle High German verje, verge.

nameMeanings.name: Gruffudd
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Griffith
meanings: Welsh (Carmarthenshire and western England): from the Old Welsh personal name Gruffudd, Old Welsh Grip(p)iud, composed of the elements grip, of uncertain significance, + iud ‘chief, lord’.

nameMeanings.name: Leuca
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: equivalent of   Luke  , now also used in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Luke
meanings: Middle English vernacular form of Lucas , Latin form of the post-classical Greek name Loukas ‘man from Lucania’. This owes its perennial popularity throughout Christian Europe to the fact that, from the 2nd century onwards, the third gospel in the New Testament has been ascribed to the Lucas or Luke mentioned at various places in Acts and in the Epistles. Little is known about him beyond the facts that he was a doctor, a Gentile, and a friend and convert of St Paul. The name was borne by the character Luke Skywalker in the film Star Wars ( 1977 ), and rose sharply in popularity in the 1990s.

en.lifeSummary: When Leuca ferch Gruffudd was born about 1190, her father, Gruffydd II ap Rhys, was 34 and her mother, Matilda de Braose, was 19. She married Geoffrey de Camville. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died about 1239, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Leuca ferch Gruffudd est née environ 1190, son père, Gruffydd II ap Rhys, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Matilda de Braose, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Geoffrey de Camville. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée environ 1239, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Leuca ferch Gruffudd um 1190 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gruffydd II ap Rhys 34 und ihre Mutter Matilda de Braose 19. Sie hat Geoffrey de Camville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb um 1239 im Alter von 51 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Leuca ferch Gruffudd è nata il circa 1190, sua padre, Gruffydd II ap Rhys, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Matilda de Braose, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato Geoffrey de Camville. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì circa 1239, all'età di 51 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Leuca ferch Gruffuddが約1190年に生まれた時，父Gruffydd II ap Rhysは34歳，母Matilda de Braoseは19歳であった。Geoffrey de Camvilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は約1239年に51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Leuca ferch Gruffudd(이)가 대략 1190년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gruffydd II ap Rhys(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Matilda de Braose(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 Geoffrey de Camville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1239년 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Leuca ferch Gruffudd nasceu aproximadamente 1190, seu pai, Gruffydd II ap Rhys, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Matilda de Braose, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Geoffrey de Camville. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1239, com 51 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Leuca ferch Gruffudd родилась около 1190 г., её отцу по имени Gruffydd II ap Rhys было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Matilda de Braose, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Geoffrey de Camville. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла около 1239 г. в возрасте 51 год.
